User.title: User
User.description: A precoded or registered user inside the system

code.description: The unique user code for login

name.description: The full name of the user

password.description: Cleartext password or hash used for simplified login

role.description: User role, such as system_admin or storekeeper

MasterItem.title: MasterItem
MasterItem.description: A warehouse master item for auditing

AuditSession.title: AuditSession
AuditSession.description: An active or archived inventory audit session

items.description: Audit item physical vs book differences

SystemState.title: SystemState
SystemState.description: The unified system database state containing users, items, and sessions

registeredUsers.description: List of active registered user profiles

activeSession.description: The currently active audit count session

lastUpdated.description: Epoch timestamp when state was last updated

/app_state/master.description: Unified Master State for real-time instantaneous cloud persistence

/app_state/development.description: Unified Development State for real-time instantaneous cloud persistence

/backups_history/{backupId}.description: Historical cloud backup copy for rotation and recovery
